title: Play Food Sets for Kids Kitchen-80PC Pretend Food with 2 Kids Picnic Basket, Toy Food with Pizza Toy, Plastic Food Cutting Toys, Play Kitchen Accessories - Fake Food, Boys Girls Gifts
features: Play Kitchen Food-Two Toy Basket: Foster your child's creativity and enhance their sensory skills with this food toys. Featuring two farmers market basket, kids can engage in pretend shopping and prepare an imaginative feast. Ideal for role-playing and educational fun

Funning Toddler Play Food: Our kids play food features a wide variety of foods and ingredients, including our unique pizza design, fruits, vegetables, seafood, desserts, beans, steak, pasta, cheese, tomato sauce, and mushroom cans. It comes with sturdy kitchen knives that can cut tomahawk steaks into chunks while zesting and breaking oranges into six petals for a total cooking experience. This play food set promotes creativity and essential developmental skills

Develop and Learn: The plastic food set features hook and loop splits and special sensory designs, allowing children to safely practice cutting, peeling, or de-shelling. This diverse set promotes creativity, social skills, and fine motor skills through various shapes, colors, and textures. It enhances color recognition, hand-eye coordination, and imaginative play, making it a valuable educational tool for young learners

High-Quality, Safe Materials: Our BPA-free realistic play food has smooth edges for safety. The realistic, durable, and vibrant design offers an authentic experience. Sized perfectly for little hands, this toy food set ensures safe, imaginative play, meeting high standards of quality and safety

Perfect Gift for All Occasions: Ideal for Christmas, birthdays, and holidays, this kitchen food toys is cherished by toddlers and kids ages 1-3 and 4–8. It enhances various skills, making it a top choice for parents and grandparents. The pretend play food includes two unique baskets, perfect for play anytime, anywhere. A thoughtful, high-quality gift for any celebration
